title: salix × uechtritzii
intro: Salix × uechtritzii, also known as Uechtritz's willow or Uechtritz willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salix × uechtritzii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Salix × uechtritzii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
